batch_summary.note: S-003: payment pressure May 15 2023 (ROW-2478). Pattern reinforcement. ARC-RF06-001 Signal 3.

messages.text: You going to pay the daycare?

primary_flags.classification: RF-06 primary Sev-1 — Continued daycare payment pressure. In context of established pattern (prior contempt threats B-003/B-004), even a single payment query carries coercive weight — it carries the implicit threat of the prior contempt escalations. Per ADD-005: payment reminders co-deployed within the broader pattern of financial leverage. ARC-RF06-001 Signal 3.
primary_flags.addendum_applied: ADD-005 (payment reminder in context of established coercion pattern).
